## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, iOS 17]
- **Screen size:** [e.g. 1920×1080, 390×844 mobile]

## 📝 Additional Notes
Any other context about the problem.
